tasks.name: Update features content config with size field
tasks.purpose: Add size field ("large"/"standard") to each feature card in the features section to support bento grid layout

constraints: Must maintain backward compatibility with existing IconName values
Size field must be "large" or "standard" string literal
Update all 6 feature cards with appropriate size values (2 large, 4 standard)

tasks.input_state: homepage-content.config.ts exists with FeatureCard interface lacking size field
tasks.output_state: FeatureCard interface updated with size: "large" | "standard", all 6 cards have size field populated
tasks.acceptance_criterion: FeatureCard interface includes size field, all 6 cards in featureCards array have size property (2 large, 4 standard)

tasks.name: Create BentoFeatureCard component

action.target: bento feature card component with glass styling and cursor-following glow

tasks.purpose: Build reusable bento card that combines glass morphism styling with cursor-following radial gradient spotlight effect, supporting large/standard size variants

constraints: Must be client component ("use client")
Accept size prop ("large" | "standard") for grid-column span
Accept iconName, title, description props
Use backdrop-filter: blur() for glass effect
Cursor glow uses radial gradient mask with useMotionValue/useMotionTemplate
Support className prop for composition
Respect prefers-reduced-motion (disable glow animation if set)

tasks.input_state: CardSpotlight pattern exists showing cursor-following radial gradient implementation
tasks.output_state: BentoFeatureCard component exists in apps/web/app/(marketing)/_components/ with glass styling, cursor glow, and size support
tasks.acceptance_criterion: BentoFeatureCard component renders with glass card styling, cursor-following spotlight on hover, and applies col-span-2 for large size

tasks.name: Create bento grid component with stagger animation

action.target: home-features-grid-client.tsx with CSS Grid bento layout

tasks.purpose: Build bento grid component with 3-column CSS Grid layout, staggered card reveal animation using whileInView, and section heading

constraints: Must be client component ("use client")
Use grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr) for bento layout
Implement container variants with staggerChildren: 0.15
Use whileInView for scroll-triggered animation
Set viewport: { once: true } for performance
Render section heading and subtitle from homepageContentConfig.features
Map feature cards to BentoFeatureCard with size prop

tasks.input_state: BentoFeatureCard component exists, features config has size field for each card
tasks.output_state: home-features-grid-client.tsx exists with bento grid layout, stagger animation, and all 6 feature cards rendered
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Bento grid component renders 3-column layout with 2 large cards (col-span-2) and 4 standard cards, stagger animation triggers on scroll

tasks.name: Integrate bento grid on homepage

action.target: bento grid component into homepage features section

tasks.purpose: Replace existing CardSpotlight grid with new BentoFeatureCard grid component in the features section

constraints: Replace existing CardSpotlight grid (lines ~179-194)
Keep existing section heading and subtitle rendering
Wrap new component in Suspense with loading fallback
Maintain existing spacing classes (spacing.section, widths.content)

tasks.input_state: page.tsx has existing CardSpotlight grid in features section
tasks.output_state: page.tsx uses HomeFeaturesGrid component instead of CardSpotlight grid
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Homepage features section renders bento grid with stagger animation, CardSpotlight imports removed
tasks.verification_command: grep 'HomeFeaturesGrid' apps/web/app/\(marketing\)/page.tsx && ! grep -q 'CardSpotlight' apps/web/app/\(marketing\)/page.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Run typecheck, lint, and format

action.target: code quality with typecheck, lint, and format

tasks.purpose: Ensure all code passes TypeScript type checking, linting rules, and formatting standards

constraints: pnpm typecheck must pass with 0 errors
pnpm lint must pass with 0 errors
pnpm format must pass

tasks.input_state: All feature files created/modified, no validation run yet
tasks.output_state: typecheck, lint, and format all pass successfully
tasks.acceptance_criterion: All three commands (typecheck, lint, format) exit with code 0
tasks.verification_command: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm format
